budget_or_use_of_funds.rationale: Convert local infrastructure into public-safe docs and examples.
Prepare reproducible local-only examples and test harnesses.
Keep gate templates and docs current for one round cycle.

deliverables: Open a read-only architecture report describing the lane/agent/task/artifact/outcome/trace/service-request model.
Publish local-only safety-gate templates for account, KYC, wallet, marketplace, bounty, and trading workflows after explicit approval.
Package reproducible fixture/checker examples for prediction markets, bounty programs, grants, and digital products using synthetic or saved public rows.
Document integrity checks for service-worker chain, egress chain, coverage, and artifact traceability.
candidate_project.problem_statement: Small builders need safe, auditable agent-company infrastructure for discovering online revenue paths without accidental account, payment, wallet, public-post, or security-testing side effects.
candidate_project.public_promotion_plan_local_only: Draft only; no public campaign, contribution solicitation, donor coordination, or quid pro quo.
roadmap: Week 1: extract sanitized architecture docs and fixture schemas from the local lab.
Week 2: prepare grant-safe public repo/docs with no private credentials, no paid opportunity targets, and no platform-sensitive data.
Week 3: add examples and acceptance tests for local-only gates.
Week 4: publish impact report and maintenance plan if approved.

duplicate_or_prior_funding_sweep: No live search or browser action performed in this packet.
Must check current Gitcoin rounds, prior local grant packets, public repo status, and any prior funding before submission.

fit_rubric.good: project clearly maps to an open Gitcoin domain such as developer tooling or public goods
work is open, non-extractive, and useful to a broader ecosystem
milestones, artifacts, and acceptance evidence are concrete
usage, adoption, developer impact, or maintenance metrics are measurable
use of funds is specific and proportional
rules, tags, and review requirements are addressed before submission
KYC, GitHub, Passport, and anti-Sybil gates are known and not bypassed
no quid pro quo, fake contributors, donation incentives, or coordinated Sybil behavior

next_local_action: Prepare sanitized public-good repo outline and exact application draft fields as local files only. Do not log in, use GitHub OAuth, start KYC/Passport, connect wallets, create Allo profiles/pools, submit grants/tag requests, donate/checkout/claim payouts, solicit contributors, post publicly, start workers/runtimes, or call model/MCP/external APIs from this packet alone.

no_submit_approval_packet.minimum_next_approval_scope: Approve exact round/domain, sanitized public-good repo/artifacts, grant rules, KYC/Passport/GitHub/wallet posture, budget, impact metrics, duplicate funding sweep, and public-campaign policy before any platform action.

fit_reasons: The lab is developer tooling and public-good infrastructure if sanitized and released as open docs/templates.
Existing evidence assets show repeatable local-only gating, traces, and integrity checks.
The project can help builders avoid unsafe account, wallet, bounty, marketplace, and trading actions.
fit_risks: Grant round/domain must be verified immediately before any application.
Private opportunity data and local operator details must be removed before public release.
KYC, Passport, GitHub OAuth, wallet, Allo, and anti-Sybil routes require human approval.
round_fit.target_round_or_domain: Gitcoin Grants developer tooling / infrastructure public-good route
